creator: jason.mours@verizon.net
text: Trying to pullpork-0.7.3 for snort rules 2990 produces : 422 Unprocessable Entity [ 422 ]. I am using the <oinkcode> successfully on my firewall. Latex is on this box. There seems to be a break in the link?  When I use links to get the md5, I receive, 'No match'. There is a break in the html at .md/5 when copy. Formatting seems pliable. The <oinkcode> is valid. Not appending ?<oinkcode> to the html in links responds with request for <oinkcode>.  I'm attaching output from the machine. Rules 29120 did not process either.
